# External Debt Stocks (DOD, Current US$) — Selected Emerging Economies (2019–2023)

| Country name | 2019 | 2020 | 2021 | 2022 | 2023 |
| --- | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| India | 558,000,000,000 | 564,000,000,000 | 614,000,000,000 | 621,000,000,000 | 646,000,000,000 |
| Brazil | 550,000,000,000 | 566,000,000,000 | 574,000,000,000 | 590,000,000,000 | 608,000,000,000 |
| Mexico | 451,000,000,000 | 417,000,000,000 | 421,000,000,000 | 470,000,000,000 | 489,000,000,000 |
| South Africa | 171,000,000,000 | 180,000,000,000 | 185,000,000,000 | 190,000,000,000 | 196,000,000,000 |
| Indonesia | 404,000,000,000 | 417,000,000,000 | 415,000,000,000 | 410,000,000,000 | 421,000,000,000 |
| Turkey | 430,000,000,000 | 450,000,000,000 | 458,000,000,000 | 445,000,000,000 | 460,000,000,000 |
| Argentina | 276,000,000,000 | 274,000,000,000 | 279,000,000,000 | 285,000,000,000 | 300,000,000,000 |
